text:
The original Xing Ho presumably became a Cronenberg in the Cronenberged dimension.

Xing Ho is the Tina-Teer for dirt and has possession of the dirt ring. The dirt ring summons dirt when the word "dirt" is said and stone when the word "stone" is said. When Planetina was summoned with Morty to Eco-Con, she expressed concern for controversy and let Eddie deal with Morty. Morty later burned Eddie and invaded the meeting room with the Tina-Teers and the Arab ambassador. After the air Tina-Teer is killed by the security guards' crossfire, Morty takes her ring and shoves it in Xing Ho's mouth. He shouts "airs" blowing her head up like a balloon before it pops and kills her.
